programme.title: MeatEater - Strange Hunt in a Strange Land: New Zealand Red Stag
programme.desc: Steven Rinella is on New Zealand's South Island for a do-it-yourself, free-range hunt for the majestic red stag. But first, he needs to secure some camp meat in the form of wild lamb. Battling weather and wary game in mountainous terrain, he uses his spot-and-stalk hunting skills to discover Kiwi red stags are a trophy worthy of the wall and the cook pot.

programme.title: MeatEater - Bush Pig: New Zealand Wild Boar
programme.desc: Steven Rinella and local pig hunting expert, Darren Moore, spend a wild, action-packed day tracking down Captain Cook boars in the thick New Zealand bush. Their tools for the job include two tough little pig dogs, a knife, and some real grit. Wild pigs are dangerous critters and this is as visceral as a hunt gets. Along the way, Steve learns a new technique for field-prepping whole hogs.

programme.title: MeatEater - The Top of the Bottom of the World: New Zealand Thar Part 1
programme.desc: With the help of guide and friend Remi Warren, Steven Rinella gears up for a massive climb into New Zealand's Southern Alps in pursuit of Chamois and Tahr. The hunters will travel light and base out of an alpine hut to find animals Steve has never hunted. Things turns adventurous quickly; with an impassable glacial river between Steve and his goal. But with hard work, Steve experiences a do-it-yourself high country hunt like no other.

programme.title: MeatEater - The Top of the Bottom of the World: New Zealand Thar Part 2
programme.desc: With the help of guide and friend Remi Warren, Steven Rinella gears up for a massive climb into New Zealand's Southern Alps in pursuit of Chamois and Tahr. The hunters will travel light and base out of an alpine hut to find animals Steve has never hunted. Things turns adventurous quickly; with an impassable glacial river between Steve and his goal. But with hard work, Steve experiences a do-it-yourself high country hunt like no other.

programme.title: MeatEater - Cooking Special: Giving Thanks
programme.desc: The Pilgrims didn't get their turkey at the store and neither does Steven Rinella. On this special Holiday episode Steve cooks three enticing dishes: Wild Turkey Galantine, Smoked Black Bear Ham, and his take on the traditional Mincemeat Pie. Appetites will run large as Steve makes a special meal for his family and friends.

programme.title: MeatEater - True North: Alaska North Slope Caribou
programme.desc: Steven Rinella and special guest, the author Tim Ferriss, travel to the remote north slope of Alaska.

programme.title: MeatEater - The Greatest Draw: Alaska Dall Sheep Part 1
programme.desc: After drawing one of the most coveted big game tags in North America, a Tok Management Area Dall sheep tag, Steven Rinella heads out for a truly rare and epic Alaskan experience. Along with his brother Danny and friend Paul, Steve is dropped deep into the Alaska Range. After a rugged hike through nasty weather, Steve's skills and fortitude are tested against his elusive, high-climbing quarry.

programme.title: MeatEater - The Greatest Draw: Alaska Dall Sheep Part 2
programme.desc: After drawing one of the most coveted big game tags in North America a Tok Management Area Dall sheep tag Steven Rinella heads out for a truly rare and epic Alaskan experience. Along with his brother Danny and friend Paul, Steve is dropped deep into the Alaska Range. After a rugged hike through nasty weather, Steve's skills and fortitude are tested against his elusive, high-climbing quarry.

programme.title: MeatEater - Sonoran Super-Birds: Mexico Gould's Turkey
programme.desc: Steven Rinella crosses the border into Mexico's desert to call in the Gould's wild turkey. Of the five turkey subspecies in North America, the Gould's is the largest but rarest. On this unique Mexican adventure, Steve finds exciting action for gobbling toms. With locally made charcoal at his disposal, he'll grill up a big, brined, delicious bird.

programme.title: MeatEater - Straight Flush: Montana Mountain Grouse
programme.desc: Steven Rinella and his friend Ronny Boehme drive into the mountains of southwest Montana to hunt the high ridge tops for dusky grouse. Ronny's Bracco Italiano hunting dogs have been bred and trained for this work, but can Ronny handle the altitude? The duo prepares dusky grouse jalape√±o poppers and grouse fettuccine with a white wine and cream sauce.

programme.title: MeatEater - Meet the Meateaters: Montana Crew Muley Part 1
programme.desc: The goal on MeatEater has always been to make viewers feel like they're on a hunt with Steven Rinella, but on this two-part episode Rinella grants his viewers an all-access pass to see just how the MeatEater crew works together to make the show. Strap-in for some behind-the-scenes action.

programme.title: MeatEater - Meet the Meateaters: Montana Crew Muley Part 2
programme.desc: The goal on MeatEater has always been to make viewers feel like theyre on a hunt with Steven Rinella, but.

programme.title: MeatEater - First Timers: Montana Mule Deer Part 1
programme.desc: Television personality Joe Rogan and his best friend, comedian Bryan Callen, join Steven Rinella for their very first hunt. On a float trip for mule deer through the rugged Missouri Breaks, this is as adventurous of a first hunt as anyone could hope for, and Steve's special guests are in for a memorable experience and delicious wild game field cooking in some gorgeous country.

programme.title: MeatEater - First Timers: Montana Mule Deer Part 2
programme.desc: Television personality Joe Rogan and his best friend, comedian Bryan Callen, join Steven Rinella for their very first hunt. On a float trip for mule deer through the rugged Missouri Breaks, this is as adventurous of a first hunt as anyone could hope for, and Steve's special guests are in for a memorable experience and delicious wild game field cooking in some gorgeous country.

programme.title: MeatEater - Swamp Stew: Michigan Bowfishing
programme.desc: Steven Rinella returns to his cherished boyhood stomping grounds along Michigans Muskegon River.

programme.title: MeatEater - The Wide Open: New Mexico Antelope
programme.desc: Steven Rinella and friend Cody Lujan head to Northeastern New Mexico to hunt pronghorn antelope, the fastest big game animal in the United States. In the wide open desert plains, Steve will have to work hard to stalk within range of a mature buck. The payoff will be antelope loin topped with local New Mexico chiles.

programme.title: MeatEater - Primal Cuts: Bone-in Cooking Special
programme.desc: In this cooking special, Steven Rinella shows his fans some of his favorite preparations for big, bone-in cuts of red meat. Interspersed with highlights from his recent caribou, buffalo, and mule deer hunts, the show features recipes that utilize some of the most underappreciated parts of big game animals. This episode is an attractive and delicious tribute to Steve's gun-to-table ethic.

programme.title: MeatEater - El Venado Blanco: Mexico Coues Deer
programme.desc: Steven Rinella returns to his favorite hunting grounds of Sonora, Mexico to hunt for a Coues deer buck during the peak rutting season. Steve sets up camp and spends days glassing mountains and canyons for these elusive, wary desert whitetails. Meanwhile, his hunting partner, Remi Warren, attempts the difficult task of stalking one with a bow. To cap off the hunt, Steve cooks a batch of venison ribs braised in a Dutch oven buried beneath hot coals.

programme.title: MeatEater - Clash of the Titans: Northern California Pig & Deer
programme.desc: In this episode, Steven Rinella joins forces with fellow hunter and wild game chef Hank Shaw in the hills of Central California to go after Columbia blacktail deer, wild pigs, and a handful of small game species that are in season. The end result is a culinary smorgasbord of epic proportions.

programme.title: MeatEater - Sea Bear: Alaska Spring Bear and Seafood
programme.desc: Steve ventures out to his hunting and fishing shack on a remote coastline of southeast Alaska's Prince of Wales Island. While hunting bears from a skiff and a canoe, Steve gathers a variety of prime seafood and makes a discovery about his own motivations as a bear hunter.

programme.desc: Polita escucha q Victoria y Arriaga esperan bebe y espera a Liliana para contarle. Festejan a Paula pero lamentablemente ella no resiste. Aníbal y candelaria se casaron. Adriana y Beatriz viven en el condo de Victoria.

programme.title: Al borde de la muerte
programme.desc: Liliana insulta a su padre. Santino regresa de Brasil. Santino, Arriaga y Guzmán crean una agencia de seguridad. Espanto ataca a Liliana. Vicente la está operando. Adriana comienza su parto.

programme.title: Reencuentro de amor
programme.desc: Vicente y Adriana se encuentran y se cuentan las fechorías de Aníbal. Nelson pide perdón a Guzmán. Adriana le reclama a Aníbal. Nikki le avisa a Roy sobre Lili. Carlos regresa y Adriana le miente.

programme.title: Verdadera hija
programme.desc: Liliana despierta y quiere casarse con Guzmán. Kendra trata de seducir a Aníbal. Candelaria le dice a Adriana toda la verdad.

programme.title: Sueño por cumplir
programme.desc: Salcero sospecha quienes atacaron a Lili. Espanto no delata a Kendra. Ella tiene planes siniestros. Carlos le reclama a Adriana. Vicente ofrece casarse con Adriana y ser el padre. Adriana le cuenta las buenas noticias a Vicente.

programme.title: Dos padres
programme.desc: Lili es operada nuevamente por hemorragia interna. Carlos quiere estar con Adriana pero ella lo rechaza. Vicente besa a Lili y Arriaga lo ve.

programme.title: Boda gay
programme.desc: Lily mejora y le pide perdón a Arriaga y a Victoria. Stefano y Jean Marie se van a casar y Odette apoya a su hijo. Lily le desea felicidad a Guzmán y Nikki y terminan amigos. Aníbal hace negocios cochinos.

programme.title: Dolor de padre
programme.desc: Día de boda de candelaria y Aníbal. Nelson no invitado llega con un regalo de bodas. Todas las verdades salen. Salcero quiere confesar sus delitos. Arriaga sale de la iglesia y sufre un shock.

programme.title: La noche más fría
programme.desc: The story focuses on Carlos, a former fighter from the Malvinas (Faulkland islands). Carlos lives in a large city square, under a gazebo that he found in the neighborhood. He tragically lost his family in the War. Times were not kind to Carlos. While looking to reunite with his son, he sweeps sidewalks in exchange for tips to help him survive winter nights which have a punishing effect on Carlo's health. Preparing for the coldest night of the year, driven by the impulse to make it, Carlos packs few belongings to seek refuge in a municipal locality. However, the luck again avoids him. An incident at the door of the shelter leaves Carlos unfairly outside. Completely unprotected, away from his usual spot, without shelter and weak health. The coldest night of the year is looming, and Carlos must face endless adversities in an uneven fight against two cruel enemies: loneliness and cold. Thus begins the coldest night only fueled by the desire to survive.

programme.title: Echando cohetes
programme.desc: Los vecinos se molestan por el ruido que provocan los cohetes de una fiesta. Rocko se queja de que Alejandra no es cariñosa con él.

programme.title: Vecinos
programme.desc: In a neighborhood in Mexico City, the neighbors have problems and silly misadventures with one another.

programme.title: El regreso de Luis
programme.desc: Luis le pide a Silvia que sea su novia, Pedro lo convence de ser mejor persona y así conseguir su amor. Los López Pérez regresan a vivir al edificio y Germán les tiene a todos una sorpresa.

programme.title: Primera cita
programme.desc: Magdalena es la nueva jefa de seguridad y, debido a los robos en el edificio, instala cámaras con la ayuda de Germán. Silvita y Luisito tienen su primera cita.

programme.title: El cumple de Silvia
programme.desc: Silvia cumple años y aconsejan a Luis que no la felicite para llamar su atención. Los López Pérez no encuentran a Morris por ningún lado y sospechan que se ha ido de la casa.

programme.title: Luis pobretón
programme.desc: Luis se ha quedado sin trabajo, por lo que buscará una nueva actividad para invitar a Silvia a salir. Por otro lado, Luismi ha llegado solo al edificio.

programme.title: La novia de Pedro
programme.desc: Pedro invita a salir a Cris, la mejor amiga de Silvia, y organiza una cita doble con Luis y Silvita. La alcaldía instala una cámara de fotomultas y los flashazos apuntan directo al edificio.

programme.title: En una relación
programme.desc: Después de un tiempo de salir juntos, Luis le pregunta a Silvia qué son y quiere que se decida de una vez. La alcaldía instala lámparas de led en el alumbrado público y la no deja dormir a los vecinos.

programme.title: Beso fallido
programme.desc: Luis invita a Silvia a ver una película a su casa, pero Pedro interrumpirá su romántico momento, pues quiere recuperar su tele. Por otra parte, Arturo jugará póker con Germán, Jorjais y Benito.

programme.title: Las pantuflas de Luis
programme.desc: Luis y Pedro hacen una apuesta para saber si se dice pantuflas o pantunflas y le preguntarán a todos los vecinos. Lorena sospecha que Benito está molesto por su nuevo galán.

programme.title: Segundo aire
programme.desc: Germán descubre que en el edificio hay una plaga de cucarachas, por lo que Magdalena le ordena que haga una inspección en su departamento.

programme.title: Número equivocado
programme.desc: Alguien grafiteó la fachada del edificio. Para retirarlo, Germán cambia el número de la entrada. ¿Recibirá Luis el paquete que espera? ¿Acudirán a pintar el departamento de Lorena?

programme.title: Magdalena y la tercera edad
programme.desc: Magdalena descubre que las personas de tercera edad recibirán tarjetas de ayuda. La familia López Pérez intenta obtener el beneficio. A Luis le molesta que Benito tenga un auto nuevo.

programme.title: Cásate conmigo
programme.desc: Comienza una guerra tras la pelea entre Silvia y Luis, sin embargo él le pide matrimonio. Lorena le pide a Germán que arregle una mesa.

programme.title: La boda
programme.desc: Luis y Silvia anuncian su boda y los vecinos los convencerán para que se casen en el edificio y ayudarán a los preparativos.

programme.title: Vecinos ruidosos
programme.desc: Los vecinos se quejan de los ruidos que vienen del departamento de Luis y Silvita, Germán intenta reparar la tubería de Lorena y los López Pérez sufren de comezón.

programme.title: Frankie regresa
programme.desc: Frankie regresa a vivir al edificio, con Lorena y con Benito, pero con la condición de que encuentre trabajo. Pero, en vez de eso, escribirá una nueva película.

programme.title: La llegada de Vanesa
programme.desc: Vanesa vuelve al edificio para visitar a los Vecinos y ponerse al corriente. Benito invita a su novia a "ver pelis" en el departamento, al enterarse de que sus papás saldrán.

programme.title: Sortilegio
programme.desc: Alejandro returns home after a terrible accident to discover that he is married to Maria Jose, a poor, innocent girl who was deceived by Alejandro's brother Bruno. Bruno used Alejandro's name to marry Maria Jose, soon after he sent to kill his brother in hopes that Maria Jose would inherit Alejandro's fortune. But when Maria Jose arrives at the mansion she realizes that Bruno lied to her and used her. She is also scared when Alejandro is found alive and returns home. Doctors tell Alejandro that he suffers from memory loss but he is convinced he never met Maria Jose before and goes in search of the truth, but during this time and Maria Jose actually fall in love, while Bruno and Maura (Alejandro's ex-girlfriend) plot to break them up. Meanwhile, the brothers' mother Victoria has fallen in love with Fernando--Alejandro's best friend, so closer to his age than hers.

Doctors tell Alejandro that he suffers from memory loss but he is convinced he never met Maria Jose before and goes in search of the truth, but during this time and Maria Jose actually fall in love, while Bruno and Maura (Alejandro's ex-girlfriend) plot to break them up. Meanwhile, the brothers' mother Victoria has fallen in love with Fernando--Alejandro's best friend, so closer to his age than hers.
